<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="b8qdq2BYlFXWinLrdl05"> <mxGraphModel dx="3089" dy="-9992" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-242.16" y="42020" width="1240" height="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="App calls
example.com" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-200.65" y="42241.85" width="180.65" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Resolve to IP" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-200" y="42050" width="180.16" height="68.16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="Bridge" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffcc99;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="115.72" y="42050" width="179.84" height="68.16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="Host" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="446.64" y="42050" width="181.39" height="68.16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="MASQUERADE" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="441.71999999999997" y="42241.84" width="191.22" height="68.16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="Internet" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="811.07" y="42241.84" width="158.93" height="68.16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="1. DNS" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=8;endFill=1;endSize=10;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" source="3" target="4" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="2. Send" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=8;endFill=1;endSize=10;" edge="1" source="4" target="5" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="3. Forward" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=8;endFill=1;endSize=10;" edge="1" source="5" target="6" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="4. NAT" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=8;endFill=1;endSize=10;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" source="6" target="7" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="5. Send" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=8;endFill=1;endSize=10;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" source="7" target="8" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" value="6. Reply" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.75;entryX=1;entryY=0.75;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=8;endFill=1;endSize=10;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" source="8" target="7" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" value="7. Un-NAT" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=8;endFill=1;endSize=10;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" source="7" target="3" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
